class.name: HEGoAPI
class.brief_description: Singleton entry point for HEGo session management, task scheduling, and HDA discovery.
class.description:
This class owns the internal [code]HEGoSessionManager[/code] and task scheduler, initializes the Houdini API platform layer, and exposes session and task controls to scripts.
The singleton is created during module initialization and is intended to be reused for the whole runtime.
All HEGo node methods that call Houdini Engine submit work through the task scheduler and return [HEGoTask] objects. Use the scheduler query methods on this class to inspect queued, running, and completed tasks.
It also stores [code]hego/houdini_installation_path[/code] in Godot project settings. That path is used when filtering built-in Houdini libraries from [method get_hda_libraries].

method.name: clear_completed_task_history
method.description: Clears the completed task history ring buffer.

method.name: get_completed_task_history
method.description:
Returns an [Array] of [HEGoTask] objects that have finished executing (either [constant HEGoTask.COMPLETED] or [constant HEGoTask.FAILED]).
The history is stored in a ring buffer capped at 64 entries. Newest entries are at the front of the array.

method.name: get_current_task
method.description: Returns the [HEGoTask] currently being executed on the background worker thread, or [code]null[/code] if the scheduler is idle.

method.name: get_hda_libraries
method.description:
Returns metadata for currently loaded non-built-in HDA libraries.
The dictionary is keyed by library name when available (otherwise by library id as a string). Each value contains: - [code]id[/code]: HAPI asset library id. - [code]file_path[/code]: source library path. - [code]name[/code]: basename without extension. - [code]asset_count[/code]: number of available assets in the library. - [code]assets[/code]: [PackedStringArray] of operator names.
Returns an empty dictionary if no session is active, if no libraries are loaded, or if querying HAPI fails.

method.name: get_houdini_installation_path
method.description: Returns the configured Houdini installation path from project settings.

method.name: get_pending_tasks
method.description:
Returns an [Array] of [HEGoTask] objects waiting in the scheduler queue (status [constant HEGoTask.PENDING]).
Does not include the currently running task. See [method get_current_task] for that.

method.name: get_singleton
method.description: Returns the global [HEGoAPI] singleton instance created during module initialization.

method.name: get_task_pending_count
method.description:
Returns the number of tasks waiting in the scheduler queue.
This count does not include the currently running task.

method.name: is_session_active
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] when the Houdini Engine session is currently active.

method.name: start_session
method.description:
Starts a Houdini Engine session and initializes HAPI.
[code]connection_type[/code] maps to [code]HEGoSessionManager::SessionType[/code]: [codeblock] 1 = InProcess 2 = NewNamedPipe 3 = NewTCPSocket 4 = ExistingNamedPipe 5 = ExistingTCPSocket 6 = ExistingSharedMemory [/codeblock]
[code]connection_data[/code] is transport-specific (for example named pipe string or socket endpoint data).
Returns [code]true[/code] on successful session startup and initialization.

method.name: stop_session
method.description:
Stops the task scheduler and then closes the active Houdini Engine session, releasing all session resources.
Any pending tasks in the queue are discarded. The currently running task, if any, is allowed to finish before the session is closed.
Returns [code]true[/code] when shutdown succeeds.

method.name: submit_task
method.description:
Submits an [HEGoTask] to the scheduler queue for execution on the background worker thread.
This is called internally by HEGo node methods. Direct use is rarely needed unless you are building custom task pipelines.
Returns the same [HEGoTask] that was passed in, for convenience.
